title: Demand for gold loans rising, more people resorting to pledging their gold ornaments, says Muthoot Finance MD
description: In FY26 the company’s consolidated Profit after Tax (PAT) increased 98% YoY to ₹10,607 crore. Its consolidated Loan Assets Under Management grew 49% YoY to ₹1,81,916 crore in FY26. Board declares dividend of ₹30 per share.
